content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 18, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 18, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, enhancing mobile-first chat capabilities, and resolving critical billing and deployment leaks. Significant progress was made in hardening the Telegram bot connector, refining the UI search experience, and ensuring the reliability of dedicated agent heartbeats.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure & Billing Hardening
*   Enabled `APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED` for production cutover and codified headscale-on-control-plane IaC to prevent DR gaps ([#8425](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8425), [#8565](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8565)).
*   Migrated cloud cache and database configurations to be Railway-ready, ensuring compatibility with TCP Redis and TLS Postgres ([#8602](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8602)).
*   Resolved critical billing leaks, including container stop-job enforcement, atomic credit-balance decrements, and database deprovisioning logic ([#8517](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8517)).

### Mobile & Cloud Chat Enhancements
*   Implemented a REST-based chat adapter for shared-runtime agents to unblock mobile chat functionality ([#8527](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8527)).
*   Standardized the floating chat as the primary search surface across all page views, improving discoverability and UX ([#8597](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8597), [#8599](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8599), [#8605](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8605)).
*   Added "Her"-style bidirectional voice features and conversational onboarding to the shell ([#8581](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8581)).

### Connector & Plugin Resilience
*   Hardened the Telegram bot connector with improved 429 resilience, markdown support, and personal identity role-binding ([#8603](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8603), [#8606](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8606), [#8589](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8589)).
*   Fixed media model registration gating in `plugin-openai` to prevent errors on text-only endpoints like Cerebras ([#8614](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8614)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8618](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8618): Fix dedicated agent heartbeat.
*   [#8569](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8569): Default conversation `updatedAt` to prevent dropped Cloud chat sends.
*   [#8550](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8550): Tutorial UX improvements for chat steps and navigation.
*   [#8544](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8544), [#8540](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8540): "Her" voice and iOS fused voice development.
*   [#8542](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8542): Remove legacy onboarding.
*   [#8541](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8541): Unified spatial view framework.
*   [#8539](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8539): iOS model-grind fixes.
*   [#8535](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8535): Cloud apps review.
*   [#8524](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8524): Navigate to `/dashboard/agents/deploy` for e2e testing.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **Mobile Pipeline & Android Builds:** Resolved issues regarding web-less APK generation and plugin registration failures on clean builds ([#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387)).
*   **Apps Billing & Correctness:** Completed all critical billing leak fixes, including container stop-jobs, atomic debits, and database deprovisioning ([#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   **UI/Connector Hijacking:** [#8613](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8613) reports that the `VIEWS` action incorrectly hijacks text-connector turns, resulting in desktop-only navigation without a visible reply.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342) Apps Billing:** Extensive discussion regarding the resolution of billing leaks. Maintainers confirmed that all critical leaks (suspended containers, orphaned DBs, and non-atomic debits) are resolved. Pricing decisions were finalized to fold tenant-DB costs into container fees rather than separate line items.
*   **[#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387) Android Builds:** Detailed debugging of on-device crashes and APK packaging. The community verified that unifying the Capacitor and Gradle build trees and implementing a web-payload mirror successfully resolved the "web-less APK" regression.
*   **[#8613](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8613) VIEWS Action Hijacking:** Addressed via connector-capability tiering. The `VIEWS` action now drops desktop-only navigation modes when the message arrives over a text-only connector, ensuring users receive a text-based reply instead of a silent UI navigation.
